title: else if
subtitle: Another condition to check
goal: Learn to check several conditions in sequence using else if.
explanation: else if lets you add another check after if.
If the first condition does not pass, JavaScript checks the next one.
You can create a chain of many conditions.
Only the first block whose condition is true will run.
else if is often used to choose one option from several.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: First, you check whether it is hot. If not, you check whether it is warm. If not, you check whether it is cold.

remember: Conditions are checked from top to bottom.
After the first true condition, the remaining checks are skipped.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners may think every else if block runs. In fact, only the first block with a true condition runs.
